translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent (LONG bias). Entry requires price above 50-SMA, ADX confirmation of directional movement >20, and 20-period close strength (simplified as sma_20 > sma_20 as close proxy to 'recent 20-period close > 20-period SMA'). Exit on either price closing below 50-SMA OR ADX falling below 15 (OR logic). The '6 weeks minimum trend consistency' is captured by ADX > 20 threshold which requires established directional strength. 'Visually clear from distance' operationalized through ADX and MA alignment requirements.
validation_issues: entry_long: impossible condition 'sma_20 > sma_20' is always false
